summary: Session 33 — Ghost Counter dj-brain wiring re-test after main agent fix. All 6/6 pytest cases now PASS. The previously failing test_dj_brain_includes_ghost_counter now succeeds with strengthened assertions (verifies ghost_counter key present, non-null, no error, and inner ledger has target_weekday='Tue', streams.Tue.played_p1_set=[1,11,13,26], streams.Fri.played_p1_set=[3,10,22,25]). Ghost-counter regression for /api/ghost-counter/06.05.2026/swiss still produces Wed=[1,2,4] and Sat=[1,8,10,11] — nothing broke. /api/dj-orchestra and pre-existing dj-brain keys (envelope, frequency, ranked_suspects, ranked_stars) remain intact.

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 200 with {'error': ...} body instead of HTTP 400/422. Functional but non-canonical REST. Pre-existing — acceptable per current contract.
